top_signals.title: Iran, Israel Pledge to End Attacks That Threatened Talks
top_signals.summary: Iran and Israel agreed to ease strikes against each other after a flare-up in violence threatened to derail peace negotiations and led President Donald Trump to appeal for de-escalation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Agencies publish resolution plan feedback letters for certain domestic and foreign banking organizations
top_signals.summary: Agencies publish resolution plan feedback letters for certain domestic and foreign banking organizations
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Blue Owl Fund Hit by Redemptions Set to Sell $500 Million Bond
top_signals.summary: One of Blue Owl Capital Inc.’s private credit funds that capped redemptions earlier this year is set to raise $500 million from an investment-grade bond sale.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: ABS Shares Technical Approach to Support IMO Pathway to Decarbonization
top_signals.summary: In an open letter to the industry, ABS has set out a measured and data-driven approach to support the development of an effective global framework for maritime decarbonization.Titled, The ABS View: A Practical Path Forward on IMO Mid-Term Measures…
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.summary: Speech At American University, Washington, D.C.

top_signals.title: Waller, Policy Risks Have Changed
top_signals.summary: Speech At The Centre for Central Banking Guest Lecture, Frankfurt School of Finance and Management, Frankfurt, Germany

top_signals.title: Indian firm to export green methanol for bunkering in Sri Lanka
top_signals.summary: Indian project developer Agastya Green Fuels has signed a long-term offtake agreement with Sri Lankan bunker supplier SAR Maritime to export 250,000 mt/year of e-methanol for bunkering in Sri Lanka. Agastya Green Fuels has planned a 1 million mt/year e-methanol production and export facility at Mulapeta Port in Andhra Pradesh, India. The project is expected ...

top_signals.title: Gogs patches critical zero-day enabling remote code execution
top_signals.summary: Gogs has patched a critical security zero-day flaw that can allow attackers to compromise Internet-facing instances and access any repositories (including private ones). [...]
